## Proposed change

<!-- Describe your change and the problem it solves. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bugfix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing functionality)
- [ ] Code quality / refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency upgrade

## Checklist

- [ ] The change works locally on Home Assistant
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Translations updated where relevant (`strings.json`, `translations/`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (or commit uses Conventional Commits)
